steps.t: King Elessar has asked you to speak to his attendants on the overlook north-west of the burning Harlond to learn what must be done for the counter-att…
Gondorian swords were dropped on the sloping path when the soldiers retreated to the overlook north-west of the burning Harlond.
You were told to leave the swords you retrieved in a barrel by the graveyard outside the burning Harlond, rescue frightened horses that fled in the di…
With the tasks given to you by King Elessar's attendants now completed, you should return to the graveyard outside the burning Harlond and prepare to …
Aphadaer has called you to him at the graveyard outside the burning Harlond.
King Elessar is at the graveyard outside the burning Harlond, preparing to strike back against the invaders.
Belondor is at the graveyard outside the burning Harlond.
